name: Basic Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the eggs into a small bowl and add water. Beat until the yolks are fully incorporated.
2. Melt butter in a 7 to 8 inch non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add peanut oil and heat until the butter is bubbling.
4. Pour the egg mixture into the pan. When the edges begin to set, lift with a spatula and gently shake the pan to allow any uncooked egg to run underneath.
5. Once the egg no longer flows freely, use a spatula to loosen the egg along the edge of the pan.
6. Slide the omelet onto a serving plate and fold it in half (slide onto the plate slowly; when half is on the plate, gently tilt the pan over to fold the omelet in half).
